meaning: n.雏菊,第一流的,一流的人物 Daisy 戴西(女子名)
examples: Daisy called her daffy, but goodhearted.
Racing up the stairs, he almost collided with Daisy.
Each device offers the unparalleled ability to charge USB devices and daisy chain multiple speakers together.
Plus, with dual Thunderbolt ports, the user can daisy chain up to six Thunderbolt peripherals together.
